meta.title: Huilauloa | Community Nonprofit in Kailua-Kona
meta.description: Huilauloa is a community nonprofit in Kailua-Kona supporting youth programs, cultural events, ocean stewardship, and the annual Honl's surf contest.

about.label: About
about.title: Building a Stronger Community, Together
about.p1: Huilauloa is a nonprofit rooted in Kailua-Kona, created to support local families, youth, and culture through meaningful community programs.
about.p2: This homepage is now structured as our main organization site, with the Honl's surf contest included as one of several initiatives. We will refine mission and program copy in the next phase.

u12.name: Under 12
u12.description: Young groms 11 years and under showing the future of bodyboarding

u18.name: Under 18
u18.description: Junior division for competitors 12–17 years old

dropknee.name: Drop Knee
dropknee.description: DK specialists riding with one knee up

schedule.label: Event
schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.note: Schedule subject to change based on conditions

sponsors.label: Partners
sponsors.title: Community Partners
sponsors.subtitle: We work with local organizations, businesses, and volunteers who believe in long-term impact for Kona.

become.title: Partner With Huilauloa
become.description: Help us sustain programs that serve youth, families, and ocean stewardship efforts across our community.

cta.title: Want to Support the Mission?
cta.description: Connect with us to volunteer, partner, or help shape upcoming Huilauloa initiatives.

register.label: Competition
register.title: Registration
register.signInMessage: You need to sign in to register.

success.title: You're Registered
success.message: See you at Honl's Beach, June 14–15, 2026.

form.terms: By registering, you acknowledge that bodyboarding involves inherent risks. Competitors under 18 must have a parent sign a waiver at check-in.

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.signInMessage: Sign in to view your dashboard.

noRegistrations.title: No Registrations
noRegistrations.message: You haven't registered for any divisions.

standings.label: Live
standings.title: Standings
standings.subtitle: Tournament brackets and results by division

programs.label: What We Do
programs.title: Programs & Initiatives
programs.subtitle: From youth development to ocean stewardship, Huilauloa supports community-led projects throughout the year.

community.name: Community Support
community.description: Local events, family outreach, and collaborative projects designed to strengthen connections across Kona communities.

youth.name: Youth Development
youth.description: Skill-building opportunities and mentorship pathways that help keiki grow with confidence, responsibility, and pride.

stewardship.name: Ocean Stewardship
stewardship.description: Programs that encourage care for our coastlines and water resources through education, service, and stewardship efforts.

honlsClassic.name: Honl's Surf Contest
honlsClassic.description: Our annual surf and bodyboarding contest remains an important community tradition and one part of Huilauloa’s broader work.

events.label: Community Calendar
events.title: Year-Round Activities
events.subtitle: Our programming evolves seasonally as we collaborate with families, schools, and local partners.
events.note: Event details and dates will be updated as planning is finalized.

spring.title: Community Planning Sessions
spring.description: Open conversations with residents and partners to shape upcoming projects and priorities.

summer.title: Youth & Ocean Programs
summer.description: Hands-on activities and gatherings focused on youth engagement and ocean awareness.

fall.title: Cultural & Community Events
fall.description: Public events that celebrate shared values, local traditions, and community participation.

winter.title: Honl's Contest Season
winter.description: Preparation and support for the annual surf contest as part of our larger community mission.
